onset.Description: Event onset time measured from the beginning of the corresponding BOLD run.

duration.Description: Event duration. For instantaneous events, duration is 0.

trial_id.Description: Sequential trial index within the run (1-based).

trial_type.Description: Type of event within each trial.

Levels.response: Key press (typically modeled as an impulse at response time).

image_id.Description: Food image ID (from the food_pics database).

rating_value.Description: Participant's rating value recorded for the trial: 1–4.

red.Description: Red channel intensity of the food image (averaged pixel-intensity).

green.Description: Green channel intensity of the food image (averaged pixel-intensity).

blue.Description: Blue channel intensity of the food image (averaged pixel-intensity).

protein.Description: Nutritional attribute associated with the food (protein from the food_pics database).

fat.Description: Nutritional attribute associated with the food (fat from the food_pics database).

carb.Description: Nutritional attribute associated with the food (carbohydrate from the food_pics database).
